# RestoreAssist — AI Crawler Guide
# https://restoreassist.com.au

RestoreAssist is Australia's compliance platform for disaster restoration contractors.

## What we do
- Contractor compliance management (IICRC, NRPG, trade licences)
- Job management for water damage, fire damage, mould remediation
- Invoice generation and reporting
- Continuing education tracking (IICRC CEC points)

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://restoreassist.com.au
- Features: https://restoreassist.com.au/features
- Pricing: https://restoreassist.com.au/pricing
- Compliance: https://restoreassist.com.au/compliance

## Data freshness
Sitemap: https://restoreassist.com.au/sitemap.xml
